# Version 4.150.1 (Unreleased)
> **Skia m150 stability fixes**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.150.1 merges additional upstream Skia m150 bug fixes for improved stability.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Additional upstream Skia m150 bug fixes** — Two rounds of cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m150 branch have been merged, improving rendering stability and correctness. ([#4429](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4429), [#4379](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4379))
